purpose: Hono is an ultrafast, lightweight web framework built on Web Standards, supporting any JavaScript runtime, ideal for creating web applications across multiple environments like Cloudflare, Deno, and Node.js.

public_api.name: Hono
public_api.summary: Creates a new instance of the Hono application.

usage_patterns.title: Basic Routing
usage_patterns.body: Define routes using app.get() or app.post() with a path and a handler function that takes a context parameter.

gotchas: Environment-specific features such as static file serving may vary.
Middleware must be adapted per environment if specific features are needed.

examples.title: Hello World
examples.code: import { Hono } from 'hono'; const app = new Hono(); app.get('/', (c) => c.text('Hello Hono!')); export default app;
